provider_details: {"descriptor":{"images":["https://storage.googleapis.com/bo3151920215/business/f6126b0429c74d67aa741c3879343cf8/logo.jpeg"],"long_desc":"Renee Cosmetics offers a range of makeup and skincare products designed to enhance natural beauty and boost confidence. Their products are known for their quality, innovative formulations, and focus on providing a \"glow-up\" experience. Renee's products are designed to be user-friendly, often combining makeup and skincare benefits in one product.   Here's why you might consider using Renee products:  1. Makeup and Skincare Integration:  Hydration and Glow:  Many Renee products, like the Lumi Glow Cream and Glass Glow Pre-Makeup Oil, focus on hydrating the skin and providing a dewy, radiant look.   Multi-Purpose Products:  The Bollywood Filter Primer, for example, acts as a pore filler, base makeup, and pore minimizer, offering a streamlined approach to skincare.   Long-lasting Base:  Renee's Face Base Compact Powder provides a smooth, matte finish that can be worn alone or as a base for other makeup, offering long-lasting coverage  2. Innovative Formulations:  Advanced Hydration:  Renee products often incorporate ingredients like Vitamin E, hyaluronic acid, and other nourishing elements to keep skin soft and hydrated.   Lightweight and Non-Sticky:  Renee aims to create products that feel comfortable on the skin, avoiding greasiness and stickiness.   Unique pH Lipstick:  The Madness pH Lipstick adjusts to your lips' natural pH, creating a unique shade for each individual.   3. Focus on Confidence and Self-Expression:  \"Glow-Up\" Experience:  Renee's products are designed to help users achieve a radiant, confident look.   Easy to Use:  Many products are designed for simple application, making them accessible to a wide range of users.   Versatile Range:  Renee offers a variety of products, from lipsticks and mascaras to primers and serums, allowing users to create a complete makeup look  Specific Product Examples:  Lumi Glow Cream: Hydrates, reduces pigmentation, fine lines, and wrinkles, and provides a dewy glow.   Bollywood Filter Primer: Fills pores, minimizes their appearance, and creates a smooth base for makeup.   Glass Glow Pre-Makeup Oil: Hydrates the skin, adds a radiant glow, and can be used as a regular moisturizer or primer.   Face Base Compact Powder: Provides a long-lasting, matte finish and helps to even out skin tone.   Korean Glow Serum: Lightweight, non-greasy, and hydrates the skin for a dewy, glassy look.   Madness pH Lipstick: Changes color based on your pH, creating a personalized shade.
